title: margaritopsis gossweileri
intro: Margaritopsis gossweileri, also known as the False Tillandsia, is a species of flowering plant in the bromeliad family. This epiphytic plant has been used in traditional medicine in various parts of Africa for its medicinal properties, including antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Margaritopsis gossweileri include its potential to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant properties, as well as its ability to reduce fever and alleviate symptoms of the common cold. Margaritopsis gossweileri can be prepared as a tea or tincture for oral consumption, and its leaves can also be crushed and applied topically to the skin to aid in wound healing.
